---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Floatilla
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, one-line description of the feature.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Which category would this fit in?

- [ ] Navigation & Planning
- [ ] Safety & Alerts
- [ ] Weather & Environment
- [ ] Instruments & Data
- [ ] Voyage
- [ ] Social & Community
- [ ] Racing
- [ ] Settings / infrastructure
- [ ] Backend / server

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, or any other context.
